scenarios.title: Hormuz closure
scenarios.body: Iran closes or contests the strait → ~20 Mb/d oil + 1/5 of LNG at risk → war-risk insurance 10-50x within days (London prices it first) → Asia refiners scramble, SPR releases, oil +$30-60 → freight + goods inflation global. Watch: Lloyd's rate cards, tanker AIS, US 5th Fleet posture. Duration is everything: a week is a spike; a quarter is a recession.

scenarios.title: Taiwan blockade
scenarios.body: Quarantine/blockade (no invasion needed) → insurance withdrawal halts shipping → TSMC wafers + ASE packaging severed → NVIDIA pipeline stops in weeks; global electronics in months → Luzon cable risk adds data severance. No meaningful substitute capacity exists (AZ fabs: single-digit %, no packaging). This is the tail that re-prices everything; even a 5% annual probability dominates expected-loss math.

scenarios.title: China REE/magnet embargo
scenarios.body: Beijing converts the Apr-2025 licensing regime into denial (response to chip escalation) → NdFeB magnet flow stops → EV motors, wind turbines, defense systems (F-35 uses ~400kg REE) queue behind 3-5yr western separation buildout → MP/Lynas re-rate violently; DoD floors extend to other minerals. The most-rehearsed, most-likely-executed economic weapon in this atlas.

scenarios.title: US power crunch deepens
scenarios.body: DC demand (4.4%→6.7-12% by 2028) meets sold-out turbines + 5yr queues + transformer scarcity → capacity auction prices spike (PJM already 10x) → ratepayer politics turn against DCs → behind-the-meter gas (Abilene model) + restarts (Palisades, Crane) become the only fast paths → power, not chips, sets the AI buildout's clock speed 2026-29. This is the base case, not a tail.

scenarios.title: Cable sabotage wave
scenarios.body: Gray-zone actors extend the Baltic/Matsu/Red-Sea pattern → simultaneous cuts at Egypt corridor + Luzon → EU-Asia latency/capacity crisis, cloud + trading reroute via US → repair-ship fleet (~60 aging vessels worldwide) becomes the binding constraint, repairs queue for months → cable-route diversity and repair capacity get repriced as strategic assets. Cheapest scenario to trigger; least modeled by markets.
